headline: Garmin, QuantumScape, and Synaptics: Three Under-the-Radar Tech Plays Worth Watching
summary: Most investors chasing AI plays are staring at the same handful of mega-caps. Meanwhile, three companies are quietly putting up results worth a closer look: a GPS and wearables giant printing record revenues, a semiconductor firm riding the edge AI wave, and a pre-revenue battery startup that just crossed its first commercial milestone. Ranked from ... Garmin, QuantumScape, and Synaptics: Three Under-the-Radar Tech Plays Worth Watching
